class.name: FmodAudioEffectChorus
class.brief_description: Chorus effect for thickening and enriching audio with multiple detuned voices.
class.description: FmodAudioEffectChorus creates a chorus effect by mixing the original signal with multiple delayed and pitch-modulated copies (voices). This produces a thicker, richer sound similar to multiple instruments or voices playing in unison. The effect uses up to 4 voices, each with independently configurable delay, modulation rate, depth, level, filter cutoff, and panning. Use this effect to add warmth, depth, and spatial width to audio.

method.name: get_voice_count
method.description: Returns the number of active chorus voices (1-4).

method.name: get_voice_cutoff_hz
method.description: Returns the lowpass filter cutoff frequency for the specified voice.

method.name: get_voice_delay_ms
method.description: Returns the base delay time in milliseconds for the specified voice.

method.name: get_voice_depth_ms
method.description: Returns the modulation depth in milliseconds for the specified voice.

method.name: get_voice_level_db
method.description: Returns the output level in decibels for the specified voice.

method.name: get_voice_pan
method.description: Returns the stereo panning position for the specified voice (-1.0 to 1.0).

method.name: get_voice_rate_hz
method.description: Returns the modulation rate in Hertz for the specified voice.

method.name: set_dry
method.description: Sets the dry (unprocessed) signal level (0.0 to 1.0).

method.name: set_voice_count
method.description: Sets the number of active chorus voices (1-4).

method.name: set_voice_cutoff_hz
method.description: Sets the lowpass filter cutoff frequency for the specified voice.

method.name: set_voice_delay_ms
method.description: Sets the base delay time in milliseconds for the specified voice.

method.name: set_voice_depth_ms
method.description: Sets the modulation depth in milliseconds for the specified voice.

method.name: set_voice_level_db
method.description: Sets the output level in decibels for the specified voice.

method.name: set_voice_pan
method.description: Sets the stereo panning position for the specified voice (-1.0 = left, 1.0 = right).

method.name: set_voice_rate_hz
method.description: Sets the modulation rate in Hertz for the specified voice.

method.name: set_wet
method.description: Sets the wet (processed) signal level (0.0 to 1.0).

members.member: The dry (unprocessed) signal level. Range: 0.0 to 1.0.
The number of active chorus voices. Range: 1 to 4.
The wet (processed) signal level. Range: 0.0 to 1.0.
